strategosText: The Concordat has issued our first stewardship metric: ten thousand credits refined before the audit shuttle departs. Miss it and our charter standing is downgraded. Downgraded claimants historically stop appearing in records.
The Collective will contest the southern field. Harvest it anyway. Escorts are cheaper than apologies.
briefing.concordatText: NOTICE 7-C: Stewardship metrics ensure equitable extraction. Claimants are reminded that protection of Concordat audit assets is a chartered obligation.

objectives.text: Refine 10,000 credits before the audit shuttle departs (20:00)

actions.text: Concordat: Audit departure in five minutes. Metrics are non-negotiable.
